entity_types.name: FigureData
entity_types.description: Structured data extracted from one figure or table. A figure may contain multiple panels (sub-figures A/B/C/...); each panel has its own axes, data points, and trend.

fields.name: figure_id
fields.description: e.g. 'Fig.3-7' or 'Table 2-1'

fields.name: image_path
fields.description: Relative path to saved PNG

fields.name: section
fields.description: e.g. 'Results', '发酵工艺优化'

fields.name: fixed_conditions
fields.description: Conditions held constant across the whole figure (e.g. strain, medium)

fields.name: panels
fields.description: One entry per sub-figure. Use a single panel with empty panel_label for figures without sub-panels.

fields.name: panel_label
fields.description: e.g. 'A', 'B', '(a)', or empty if the figure has only one panel.

fields.name: figure_type
fields.description: Visual type of THIS panel.

fields.name: x_axis
fields.description: Independent variable for this panel.

fields.name: label
fields.description: Axis label exactly as printed (e.g. 'log n(GAPDH)', '发酵时间').

fields.name: unit
fields.description: e.g. 'h', '°C', 'g/L', empty if dimensionless.

fields.name: range_description
fields.description: e.g. '0–144h' or 'log scale 4–12'

fields.name: y_axis
fields.description: Primary dependent variable for this panel.

fields.name: y_axis_secondary
fields.description: Right-side / second y-axis if the panel has dual axes (e.g. yield vs OD600).

fields.name: data_points
fields.description: One measurement per entry. For dual-axis or multi-series panels, include the series name in conditions, e.g. {x: '10-Pp', series: 'OD600'}.

fields.name: conditions
fields.description: x value(s) and any series/group label, e.g. {'x': '10-Pp-Pr-Pab1', 'series': 'hICOLIII'}

fields.name: values
fields.description: y value(s), e.g. {'yield_gL': 0.92}

fields.name: point_type
fields.description: max | min | optimal | inflection | plateau_start | other

fields.name: fitted_equation
fields.description: If the panel shows a regression line / model fit, the equation as printed (e.g. 'y = -3.0586x + 45.174')

fields.name: r_squared
fields.description: Goodness-of-fit value if shown (e.g. '0.9989')

fields.name: observed_trend
fields.description: One sentence describing the relationship in this panel.

fields.name: interpolation_range
fields.description: Safe range for parameter selection across the figure

fields.name: industrial_note
fields.description: Relevance for process parameter selection
